findings: V2 account summary does not render an empty video-channel platform entry
Legacy account row reuses the outer platform-card grid and is visibly cramped at 1280/1440

scope: Current desktop application center and publishing account-management visual evaluation on macOS host

observed: planning buttons remain visible but disabled

publish_center_v2_account_summary.finding: 当前 V2 账号分组按已有账号渲染；暂无账号的视频号不会显示为可添加平台。

抖音/视频号/快手/小红书四个平台均显示

legacy_account_management_fallback.finding: 账号行复用了外层 publish-account-card 三列布局，导致 1280/1440 视口下名称和按钮明显拥挤、纵向折行；1280x800 下下方平台卡片需要滚动才能看到。

automated_checks.desktop_build: passed; existing Vite chunk-size warning only

screenshots.note: empty placeholder observed together with transient backend error; not a pure empty-backend proof

conclusion: Mac development-rendered visual evidence is complete with explicit boundaries. Do not mark packaged Tauri visual acceptance complete until a Mac Rust/Cargo toolchain is available and the packaged app is launched. Account-management layout and V2 empty-platform behavior require a follow-up UI decision/fix.
